query: まだメジャーじゃない日本の伝統的な食文化を教えて。
reasoning: The tool and language param are correct (RULE A — get_local_food with lang=ja is the right tool class), and all returned MAFF GI records are authoritative (RULE C does not apply since the core query constraint was ignored entirely). However the query's central constraint — 'not yet mainstream' — is completely unaddressed: no keyword filter was passed, the 500 items returned start with registration_number order (あおもりカシス, 但馬牛, 夕張メロン) which includes some of Japan's most famous GI products. Per RULE B the single worst-affected dim is constraint_handling (2); specificity and practical_usefulness also drop by 1 each from their otherwise-deserved scores. Language constraint (ja) is honoured so no RULE D penalty.
missing_data: A keyword filter targeting lesser-known or regional items (e.g. keyword='郷土料理' or filtering by low name-recognition proxy) is absent; ideally the tool would surface items from rural prefectures or with few Google/tourism-site hits rather than returning registration_number-sorted GI list starting from the most famous products.
improvement_hint: Add a 'popularity_tier' or 'obscurity' filter to get_local_food, or support a keyword arg (e.g. keyword='郷土料理') so agents can narrow to lesser-known regional foods. Alternatively, route intent 'non-mainstream food culture' to a semantic search over郷土料理 records rather than the full GI list.
